shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'pwd && git status --short && rg -n "isValidating|_setValid|isValid" src/logic src/ | head -240'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-hook-form validity stale async resolver isValidating" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'git log --oneline -12 -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts && rg -n "validation.*latest|stale|isValidating|_setValid" src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx src/__tests__/useForm/resolver.test.tsx src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx'
/bin/bash -lc 'git remote -v && git branch -a --contains HEAD | head -20 && git log --all --oneline -S"_setValid" -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts | head -30'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "whole-form validity async stale result latest pass resolver isValidating" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "In react-hook-form src/logic/createFormControl.ts, _setValid is fire-and-forget and can overlap across mount, setValue, unregister, reset, and other operations. Async built-in validation or resolver passes must use a monotonically increasing validity-check id and commit only if their id is still current; for resolver forms, the same guard must precede _updateIsValidating() so a stale pass cannot clear validating state belonging to a newer pass." -t "Whole-form validity checks require latest-pass guards" --unit-type learning -l label_react-hook-form -l label_validation -l label_concurrency -s codex -i 0.8'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
